purpose: Fixed client request for release-matched native ShakeMap integration verification

source.license: USGS public domain in the United States and CC0-1.0 as stated by the upstream repository
source.description: USGS ShakeMap v4.4.9 South Napa test event and instrumental station list

files.transformation: Changed id from nc72282711 to SCENARIO and added event_type=SCENARIO; origin values are unchanged
Renamed stationlist.xml to event_dat.xml and changed the embedded earthquake id from 72282711 to SCENARIO; observations are unchanged

observations.provenance: Unmodified observation values from the official USGS ShakeMap v4.4.9 South Napa test station list

limitations: This is a verification scenario, not a current real-event feed.
Including observations does not make station data mandatory for all calculations.
No finite rupture is included; ShakeMap uses its point-source behavior.
Generic XML or JSON parsing does not prove native ShakeMap acceptance.
A native pass proves only compatibility with the paired verification package and exact image identity.
